This is a good time to think about your expectations. You should already have an idea of what kind of (digital) material you will be creating or analysing in your project, even if it is still vague and you don’t have specific details. If this is the case, click on “Specify datasets.” and describe the expected material as well as possible in this early stage. You can mention in the DMP (= your export document from the tool) that the data description is a broad estimation that will be updated in a later version of the DMP. If you come to the conclusion that you will not create or analyse any data, click on “No data will be created or analysed.” and follow the instructions there.
